question_text.en: A company plans to use an Amazon Snowball Edge device to transfer files to the AWS Cloud. Which activities related to a Snowball Edge device are available to the company at no cost?
question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃使用 Amazon Snowball Edge 裝置將檔案傳輸到 AWS 雲端。公司可以免費獲得哪些與 Snowball Edge 裝置相關的活動？

A.en: Use of the Snowball Edge appliance for a 10-day period
A.zh: 在 10 天內使用 Snowball Edge 裝置

B.en: The transfer of data out of Amazon S3 and to the Snowball Edge appliance
B.zh: 將資料從 Amazon S3 傳輸到 Snowball Edge 裝置

C.en: The transfer of data from the Snowball Edge appliance into Amazon S3
C.zh: 將資料從 Snowball Edge 裝置傳輸到 Amazon S3

D.en: Daily use of the Snowball Edge appliance after 10 days
D.zh: 10 天後每日使用 Snowball Edge 裝置

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：儘管 AWS 提供 Snowball Edge 裝置 10 天的免費使用期，但這不包括裝置的運輸時間，超過 10 天的使用將產生額外費用。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS offers 10 days of free use of Snowball Edge devices, this does not include shipping time for the device, and use beyond 10 days will incur additional charges.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 將資料從 Amazon S3 匯出到 Snowball Edge 裝置會收取費用，因此此傳輸方向不是免費的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS charges for exporting data from Amazon S3 to a Snowball Edge device, so this transfer direction is not free.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：當資料從 Snowball Edge 裝置匯入 Amazon S3 時，AWS 不收取資料傳輸費用。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS does not charge data transfer fees when data is imported from a Snowball Edge device into Amazon S3.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：本服務包含有限的現場使用期限；在此期限之後，將收取額外的每日裝置費用。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The service includes a limited on-site usage period; additional daily device charges apply after that period.

answer_text.zh: C. 將資料從 Snowball Edge 裝置傳輸到 Amazon S3
answer_text.en: C. The transfer of data from the Snowball Edge appliance into Amazon S3

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (83%) 其他。考點摘要：當資料從 Snowball Edge 裝置匯入 Amazon S3 時，AWS 不收取資料傳輸費用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (83%) Other. Key point: AWS does not charge data transfer fees when data is imported from a Snowball Edge device into Amazon S3.

question_text.en: A company has deployed applications on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to assess application vulnerabilities and must identify infrastructure deployments that do not meet best practices. Which AWS service can the company use to meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司已在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上部署應用程式。公司需要評估應用程式漏洞，並且必須識別不符合最佳實踐的基礎架構部署。公司可以使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？

A.en: AWS Trusted Advisor
A.zh: AWS 可信任顧問

B.en: Amazon Inspector
B.zh: Amazon Inspector

C.en: AWS Config
C.zh: AWS Config

D.en: Amazon GuardDuty
D.zh: Amazon GuardDuty

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Trusted Advisor 主要用於檢查帳戶資源的最佳實踐，包括成本最佳化、安全性、效能和容錯能力，但它並不是專門為評估應用程式漏洞而設計的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Trusted Advisor is primarily used to examine best practices for account resources, including cost optimization, security, performance, and fault tolerance, but it is not specifically designed to assess application vulnerabilities.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon Inspector 自動掃描支援的工作負載（包括 EC2 執行個體）是否有軟體漏洞和意外的網路暴露，然後報告結果以進行修復。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Inspector automatically scans supported workloads, including EC2 instances, for software vulnerabilities and unintended network exposure, then reports findings for remediation.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Config 主要用於追蹤和審核資源設定的更改，以幫助確保資源符合合規性要求，但它不會直接評估應用程式漏洞。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Config is mainly used to track and audit changes in resource settings to help ensure that resources meet compliance requirements, but it does not directly assess application vulnerabilities.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon GuardDuty 是一種威脅偵測服務，用於識別惡意活動和異常行為，但它並不是專門為評估應用程式漏洞或基礎設施部署最佳實踐而設計的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify malicious activity and anomalous behavior, but it is not specifically designed to assess application vulnerabilities or infrastructure deployment best practices.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (87%) 11%。考點摘要：Amazon Inspector 自動掃描支援的工作負載（包括 EC2 執行個體）是否有軟體漏洞和意外的網路暴露，然後報告結果以進行修復。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (87%) 11%. Key point: Amazon Inspector automatically scans supported workloads, including EC2 instances, for software vulnerabilities and unintended network exposure, then reports findings for remediation.

question_text.en: A company has a centralized group of users with large file storage requirements that have exceeded the space available on premises. The company wants to extend its file storage capabilities for this group while retaining the performance benefit of sharing content locally. What is the MOST operationally efficient AWS solution for this scenario?
question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有一組集中的使用者，其大檔案儲存需求超出了本地可用空間。該公司希望為該群體擴充套件其檔案儲存功能，同時保留本地共享內容的效能優勢。對於這種情況，營運效率最高的 AWS 解決方案是什麼？

A.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket for each user. Mount each bucket by using an S3 file system mounting utility.
A.zh: 為每個使用者建立一個 Amazon S3 儲存桶。使用 S3 檔案系統安裝公用程式安裝每個儲存桶。

B.en: Configure and deploy an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway. Connect each user’s workstation to the file gateway.
B.zh: 設定和部署 AWS Storage Gateway 檔案閘道。將每個使用者的工作站連線到檔案閘道。

C.en: Move each user’s working environment to Amazon WorkSpaces. Set up an Amazon WorkDocs account for each user.
C.zh: 將每個使用者的工作環境移至 Amazon WorkSpaces。為每個使用者設定一個 Amazon WorkDocs 帳戶。

D.en: Deploy an Amazon EC2 instance and attach an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Provisioned IOPS volume. Share the EBS volume directly with the users.
D.zh: 部署 Amazon EC2 執行個體並附加 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 預設 IOPS 磁碟區。直接與使用者共享EBS卷。

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon S3 是物件儲存而不是本機共用檔案系統。為每個使用者安裝單獨的儲存桶會增加操作複雜性，並且無法提供所需的本機檔案共用效能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is object storage rather than a native shared file system. Mounting a separate bucket for every user adds operational complexity and does not provide the requested local file-sharing performance.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Storage Gateway 的檔案閘道器模式專門用於擴充套件本地檔案儲存，同時將資料備份到雲端（Amazon S3）。支援本地快取，可以提供高效能的檔案訪問，滿足問題中「保留本地共享內容的效能優勢」的要求。運作效率高，使用者只需連線檔案閘道即可存取擴充儲存。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The file gateway mode of AWS Storage Gateway is specifically designed to expand local file storage while backing up data to the cloud (Amazon S3). It supports local caching and can provide high-performance file access, meeting the requirement of "preserving the performance advantages of local shared content" in the question. The operation efficiency is high, users only need to connect to the file gateway to access the expanded storage.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon WorkSpaces 和 Amazon WorkDocs 是用於虛擬桌面和檔案協作的服務。雖然它們可以提供儲存功能，但不適合解決本機檔案共用效能問題。將使用者工作環境遷移到雲端可能會增加複雜度，不符合問題中「保留本地共享內容的效能優勢」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon WorkSpaces and Amazon WorkDocs are services for virtual desktop and file collaboration. Although they can provide storage functions, they are not suitable for solving local file sharing performance issues. Migrating the user work environment to the cloud may increase complexity and does not meet the requirement of "preserving the performance advantages of local shared content" in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon EBS是EC2例項的塊儲存，不能作為託管本地檔案服務直接與使用者工作站共享；圍繞它構建檔案伺服器會增加操作工作。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS is block storage for EC2 instances and cannot be shared directly with user workstations as a managed local file service; building a file server around it would add operational work.

answer_text.zh: B. 設定和部署 AWS Storage Gateway 檔案閘道。將每個使用者的工作站連線到檔案閘道。
answer_text.en: B. Configure and deploy an AWS Storage Gateway file gateway. Connect each user’s workstation to the file gateway.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (96%) 4%。考點摘要：AWS Storage Gateway 的檔案閘道器模式專門用於擴充套件本地檔案儲存，同時將資料備份到雲端（Amazon S3）。支援本地快取，可以提供高效能的檔案訪問，滿足問題中「保留本地共享內容的效能優勢」的要求。運作效率高，使用者只需連線檔案閘道即可存取擴充儲存。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (96%) 4%. Key point: The file gateway mode of AWS Storage Gateway is specifically designed to expand local file storage while backing up data to the cloud (Amazon S3). It supports local caching and can provide high-performance file access, meeting the requirement of "preserving the performance advantages of local shared content" in the question. The operation efficiency is high, users only need to connect to the file gateway to access the expanded storage.

question_text.en: According to security best practices, how should an Amazon EC2 instance be given access to an Amazon S3 bucket?
question_text.zh: 根據安全最佳實踐，應如何授予 Amazon EC2 執行個體存取 Amazon S3 儲存桶的許可權？

A.en: Hard code an IAM user’s secret key and access key directly in the application, and upload the file.
A.zh: 直接在應用程式中硬編碼 IAM 使用者的金鑰和存取金鑰，並上傳檔案。

B.en: Store the IAM user’s secret key and access key in a text file on the EC2 instance, read the keys, then upload the file.
B.zh: 將 IAM 使用者的金鑰和存取金鑰儲存在 EC2 執行個體上的文字檔案中，讀取金鑰，然後上傳檔案。

C.en: Have the EC2 instance assume a role to obtain the privileges to upload the file.
C.zh: 讓EC2例項承擔角色以獲得上傳檔案的許可權。

D.en: Modify the S3 bucket policy so that any service can upload to it at any time.
D.zh: 修改S3儲存桶策略，以便任何服務都可以隨時上傳到其中。

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：將 IAM 使用者的金鑰硬編碼到應用程式中會帶來嚴重的安全風險，因為金鑰可能會洩漏或被濫用。違反 AWS 安全最佳實務。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Hardcoding an IAM user's key into an application is a serious security risk because the key can be exposed or misused. Violates AWS security best practices.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：將金鑰儲存在 EC2 執行個體上的文字檔案中也會帶來安全風險，並可能導致金鑰暴露。不符合 AWS 建議的安全實務。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Storing the key in a text file on the EC2 instance also poses a security risk and may lead to the key being exposed. Does not comply with AWS recommended security practices.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：透過 IAM 角色，EC2 執行個體可以安全地取得臨時憑證來存取 S3 儲存，而無需暴露金鑰。這是 AWS 推薦的安全最佳實踐。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Through IAM roles, EC2 instances can securely obtain temporary credentials to access S3 storage without exposing the key. This is a security best practice recommended by AWS.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：允許任何服務隨時上傳檔案將導致嚴重的安全性問題，並可能導致資料外洩或被惡意使用。違反 AWS 安全最佳實務。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Allowing any service to upload files at any time will cause serious security issues and may lead to data exposure or malicious use. Violates AWS security best practices.

answer_text.zh: C. 讓EC2例項承擔角色以獲得上傳檔案的許可權。
answer_text.en: C. Have the EC2 instance assume a role to obtain the privileges to upload the file.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (94%) 6%。考點摘要：透過 IAM 角色，EC2 執行個體可以安全地取得臨時憑證來存取 S3 儲存，而無需暴露金鑰。這是 AWS 推薦的安全最佳實踐。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (94%) 6%. Key point: Through IAM roles, EC2 instances can securely obtain temporary credentials to access S3 storage without exposing the key. This is a security best practice recommended by AWS.

question_text.en: Which option is a customer responsibility when using Amazon DynamoDB under the AWS Shared Responsibility Model?
question_text.zh: 在 AWS 責任共擔模型下使用 Amazon DynamoDB 時，哪個選項是客戶的責任？

A.en: Physical security of DynamoDB
A.zh: DynamoDB 的實體安全

B.en: Patching of DynamoDB
B.zh: DynamoDB 的修補

C.en: Access to DynamoDB tables
C.zh: 對 DynamoDB 表的存取

D.en: Encryption of data at rest in DynamoDB
D.zh: DynamoDB 中靜態資料的加密

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：實體安全由 AWS 負責。 AWS負責管理其資料中心的實體安全，包括存取控制、監控等。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Physical security is the responsibility of AWS. AWS is responsible for managing the physical security of its data centers, including access control, monitoring, etc.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：DynamoDB是託管服務，AWS負責管理和維護底層基礎設施，包括修補程式更新。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB is a managed service, and AWS is responsible for managing and maintaining the underlying infrastructure, including patch updates.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：客戶必須透過設定 IAM 身分、政策和其他授權控制來控制誰可以存取 DynamoDB 表。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The customer must control who can access DynamoDB tables by configuring IAM identities, policies, and other authorization controls.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：DynamoDB 預設啟用靜態資料加密。客戶對此不承擔任何責任，但客戶可以選擇管理自己的加密金鑰（例如使用 AWS KMS）。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB enables data-at-rest encryption by default. Customers are not responsible for this, but customers can choose to manage their own encryption keys (such as using AWS KMS).

answer_text.zh: C. 對 DynamoDB 表的存取

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (82%) 其他。考點摘要：客戶必須透過設定 IAM 身分、政策和其他授權控制來控制誰可以存取 DynamoDB 表。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (82%) Other. Key point: The customer must control who can access DynamoDB tables by configuring IAM identities, policies, and other authorization controls.

question_text.en: Which option is a perspective that includes foundational capabilities of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)?
question_text.zh: 哪個選項是包含 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 基本功能的觀點？

A.en: Sustainability
A.zh: 永續發展

B.en: Performance efficiency
B.zh: 效能效率

C.en: Governance
C.zh: 治理

D.en: Reliability
D.zh: 可靠性

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：永續性是 AWS 架構完善的框架的支柱，而不是 AWS CAF 的視角。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Sustainability is a pillar in the AWS Well-Architected Framework, not an AWS CAF perspective.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：效能效率也是AWS Well-Architected Framework的一個支柱，而不是AWS CAF的視角。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Performance efficiency is also a pillar in the AWS Well-Architected Framework, not the perspective of AWS CAF.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：治理是AWS CAF的核心視角，屬於「組織能力」範疇，旨在協助企業建立雲端治理框架和策略。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Governance is a core perspective of AWS CAF, which belongs to the "organizational capabilities" category and is designed to help enterprises establish cloud governance frameworks and policies.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：可靠性是 AWS 架構完善的框架的支柱，而不是 AWS CAF 的觀點。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reliability is a pillar in the AWS Well-Architected Framework, not an AWS CAF perspective.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (97%) 3%。考點摘要：治理是AWS CAF的核心視角，屬於「組織能力」範疇，旨在協助企業建立雲端治理框架和策略。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (97%) 3%. Key point: Governance is a core perspective of AWS CAF, which belongs to the "organizational capabilities" category and is designed to help enterprises establish cloud governance frameworks and policies.

question_text.en: A company is running and managing its own Docker environment on Amazon EC2 instances. The company wants an alternative to help manage cluster size, scheduling, and environment maintenance. Which AWS service meets these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上運作和管理自己的 Docker 環境。該公司希望有一個替代方案來幫助管理叢集規模、排程和環境維護。哪種 AWS 服務符合這些要求？

A.en: AWS Lambda
A.zh: AWS Lambda

B.en: Amazon RDS
B.zh: Amazon RDS

C.en: AWS Fargate
C.zh: AWS Fargate

D.en: Amazon Athena
D.zh: Amazon Athena

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Lambda 執行事件驅動的函式，但不管理長時間執行的 Docker 叢集或容器排程。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lambda runs event-driven functions but does not manage long-running Docker clusters or container scheduling.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon RDS 是託管關聯式資料庫服務，不運作或排程 Docker 容器。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon RDS is a managed relational database service and does not run or schedule Docker containers.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Fargate 是一種適用於容器的無伺服器運算引擎，無需調整叢集大小、在伺服器上排程任務或維護工作例項。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Fargate is a serverless compute engine for containers that removes the need to size clusters, schedule tasks on servers, or maintain worker instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Athena 是 Amazon S3 中資料的互動式查詢服務，不管理容器叢集、排程或工作執行緒基礎架構。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service for data in Amazon S3 and does not manage container clusters, scheduling, or worker infrastructure.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：AWS Fargate 是一種適用於容器的無伺服器運算引擎，無需調整叢集大小、在伺服器上排程任務或維護工作例項。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: AWS Fargate is a serverless compute engine for containers that removes the need to size clusters, schedule tasks on servers, or maintain worker instances.

question_text.en: A company wants to run a NoSQL database on Amazon EC2 instances. Which task is the responsibility of AWS in this scenario?
question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行 NoSQL 資料庫。在這種情況下，AWS 負責哪一項任務？

A.en: Update the guest operating system of the EC2 instances.
A.zh: 更新 EC2 執行個體的來賓作業系統。

B.en: Maintain high availability at the database layer.
B.zh: 保持資料庫層高可用。

C.en: Patch the physical infrastructure that hosts the EC2 instances.
C.zh: 修補託管 EC2 執行個體的實體基礎架構。

D.en: Configure the security group firewall.
D.zh: 設定安全群組防火牆。

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：在共享責任模型下，客戶負責修補和更新 EC2 執行個體上的來賓作業系統。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Under the shared responsibility model, the customer is responsible for patching and updating the guest operating system on an EC2 instance.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：資料庫層的高可用性需要客戶自行設計和實現，例如透過設定資料庫叢集或使用AWS的託管服務（例如Amazon DynamoDB或Amazon RDS）。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: High availability at the database layer requires customers to design and implement it themselves, for example by setting up a database cluster or using AWS's managed services (such as Amazon DynamoDB or Amazon RDS).

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：在共擔責任模型下，AWS 負責維護和修補託管 EC2 執行個體的底層基礎設施。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Under the shared responsibility model, AWS is responsible for maintaining and patching the underlying infrastructure that hosts the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：設定安全群組防火牆是客戶的責任，因為安全群組是客戶定義的網路存取控制規則。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: It is the customer's responsibility to set up security group firewalls, because security groups are customer-defined network access control rules.

answer_text.zh: C. 修補託管 EC2 執行個體的實體基礎架構。
answer_text.en: C. Patch the physical infrastructure that hosts the EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (97%) 3%。考點摘要：在共擔責任模型下，AWS 負責維護和修補託管 EC2 執行個體的底層基礎設施。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (97%) 3%. Key point: Under the shared responsibility model, AWS is responsible for maintaining and patching the underlying infrastructure that hosts the EC2 instances.

question_text.en: Which AWS services or tools can identify rightsizing opportunities for Amazon EC2 instances? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或工具可以辨識 Amazon EC2 執行個體的規模調整機會？ (選擇兩項。)

A.en: AWS Cost Explorer
A.zh: AWS Cost Explorer

B.en: AWS Billing Conductor
B.zh: AWS Billing Conductor

C.en: Amazon CodeGuru
C.zh: Amazon CodeGuru

D.en: Amazon SageMaker
D.zh: Amazon SageMaker

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Cost Explorer 可以協助使用者分析成本和使用情況並提供最佳化建議，包括識別單一 EC2 執行使用模式和潛在的節省機會。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Cost Explorer can help users analyze costs and usage and provide optimization recommendations, including identifying individual EC2 execution usage patterns and potential savings opportunities.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Billing Conductor主要用於管理和分配帳單費用，不涉及資源最佳化或識別EC2執行個體的適用性。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Billing Conductor is mainly used to manage and allocate billing charges, and does not involve resource optimization or identifying the suitability of EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon CodeGuru 是一款程式碼分析工具，用於最佳化程式碼效能和安全性，獨立於 EC2 執行個體的資源最佳化。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon CodeGuru is a code analysis tool used to optimize code performance and security, independent of resource optimization of EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon SageMaker 是機器學習服務，與 EC2 執行個體的資源最佳化無關。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SageMaker is a machine learning service and has nothing to do with resource optimization of EC2 instances.

E.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Compute Optimizer專門用於分析資源使用情況並提供最佳化建議，包括EC2執行個體的合理規模建議。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Compute Optimizer is specially used to analyze resource usage and provide optimization recommendations, including rightsizing recommendations for EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS Cost Explorer；E. AWS 計算最佳化器
answer_text.en: A. AWS Cost Explorer; E. AWS Compute Optimizer

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AE (97%) 3%。考點摘要：AWS Cost Explorer 可以協助使用者分析成本和使用情況並提供最佳化建議，包括識別單一 EC2 執行使用模式和潛在的節省機會。；AWS Compute Optimizer專門用於分析資源使用情況並提供最佳化建議，包括EC2執行個體的合理規模建議。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (97%) 3%. Key point: AWS Cost Explorer can help users analyze costs and usage and provide optimization recommendations, including identifying individual EC2 execution usage patterns and potential savings opportunities.; AWS Compute Optimizer is specially used to analyze resource usage and provide optimization recommendations, including rightsizing recommendations for EC2 instances.

question_text.en: Which of the following are benefits of using AWS Trusted Advisor? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 使用 AWS Trusted Advisor 有下列哪些好處？ (選擇兩項。)

A.en: Providing high-performance container orchestration
A.zh: 提供高效能容器編排

B.en: Creating and rotating encryption keys
B.zh: 建立和輪換加密金鑰

C.en: Detecting underutilized resources to save costs
C.zh: 偵測未充分利用的資源以節省成本

D.en: Improving security by proactively monitoring the AWS environment
D.zh: 透過主動監控 AWS 環境來提高安全性

E.en: Implementing enforced tagging across AWS resources
E.zh: 跨標記跨 資源實施強制標跨 資源實施強制

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Trusted Advisor 提供有關成本最佳化、效能、安全性、容錯、服務限制和卓越營運的建議；它不編排容器。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Trusted Advisor provides recommendations for cost optimization, performance, security, fault tolerance, service limits, and operational excellence; it does not orchestrate containers.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：加密金鑰的建立和輪調是 AWS KMS（金鑰管理服務）的功能，而不是 AWS Trusted Advisor 的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The establishment and rotation of encryption keys is a function of AWS KMS (Key Management Service), not of AWS Trusted Advisor.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：Trusted Advisor 可識別未充分利用的資源並建議成本最佳化操作，例如解決閒置或很少使用的運算資源問題。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Trusted Advisor identifies underutilized resources and recommends cost optimization actions, such as addressing idle or lightly used compute resources.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：Trusted Advisor 安全檢查可識別不受限制的存取或缺少安全控制等風險，並建議改善 AWS 環境安全狀況的操作。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Trusted Advisor security checks identify risks such as unrestricted access or missing security controls and recommend actions that improve the AWS environment's security posture.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：強制執行資源標籤需要治理控制，例如標籤策略、服務控制策略或 AWS Config 規則； Trusted Advisor 不強制執行標籤。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Enforcing mandatory resource tags requires governance controls such as tag policies, service control policies, or AWS Config rules; Trusted Advisor does not enforce tags.

answer_text.zh: C. 偵測未充分利用的資源以節省成本；D. 透過主動監控 AWS 環境來提高安全性
answer_text.en: C. Detecting underutilized resources to save costs; D. Improving security by proactively monitoring the AWS environment

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：CD (100%)。考點摘要：Trusted Advisor 可識別未充分利用的資源並建議成本最佳化操作，例如解決閒置或很少使用的運算資源問題。；Trusted Advisor 安全檢查可識別不受限制的存取或缺少安全控制等風險，並建議改善 AWS 環境安全狀況的操作。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CD (100%). Key point: Trusted Advisor identifies underutilized resources and recommends cost optimization actions, such as addressing idle or lightly used compute resources.; Trusted Advisor security checks identify risks such as unrestricted access or missing security controls and recommend actions that improve the AWS environment's security posture.

question_text.en: Which of the following is an advantage that users experience when they move on-premises workloads to the AWS Cloud?
question_text.zh: 下列哪一項是使用者將本地工作負載遷移到 AWS 雲端時所體驗到的優勢？

A.en: Elimination of expenses for running and maintaining data centers
A.zh: 消除執行和維護資料中心的費用

B.en: Price discounts that are identical to discounts from hardware providers
B.zh: 與硬體提供商折扣相同的價格折扣

C.en: Distribution of all operational controls to AWS
C.zh: 將所有運營控制權分配給 AWS

D.en: Elimination of operational expenses
D.zh: 消除運營費用

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：將工作負載遷移到AWS雲端後，使用者不再需要執行和維護本地資料中心，從而節省了相關的資本支出和營運費用。這是AWS雲端運算的核心優勢之一。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: After migrating workloads to the AWS cloud, users no longer need to execute and maintain local data centers, thus saving related capital expenditures and operating expenses. This is one of the core advantages of AWS cloud computing.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS的定價模式與硬體供應商的折扣不同。 AWS 採用即用即付和儲蓄計劃（例如預留執行個體和儲蓄計劃），而不是硬體供應商的傳統折扣模式。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The pricing model of AWS is different from the discounts of hardware suppliers. AWS adopts pay-as-you-go and savings plans (such as Reserved Instances and Savings Plans) instead of the traditional discount model of hardware suppliers.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：儘管AWS管理底層基礎設施，但使用者仍需要對其應用程式、資料和設定進行操作控制。 AWS採用責任共擔模式，營運控制權並未完全分配給AWS。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS manages the underlying infrastructure, users still need to have operational control over their applications, data, and settings. AWS adopts a shared responsibility model, and operational control is not fully assigned to AWS.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：雖然遷移到AWS可以減少某些營運支出（例如硬體維護），但仍有其他營運支出（例如雲端資源管理和最佳化）。因此，營運費用並未完全消除。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While moving to AWS can reduce certain operational expenses (such as hardware maintenance), there are still other operational expenses (such as cloud resource management and optimization). Therefore, operating expenses are not completely eliminated.

answer_text.zh: A. 消除執行和維護資料中心的費用
answer_text.en: A. Elimination of expenses for running and maintaining data centers

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (97%) 3%。考點摘要：將工作負載遷移到AWS雲端後，使用者不再需要執行和維護本地資料中心，從而節省了相關的資本支出和營運費用。這是AWS雲端運算的核心優勢之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (97%) 3%. Key point: After migrating workloads to the AWS cloud, users no longer need to execute and maintain local data centers, thus saving related capital expenditures and operating expenses. This is one of the core advantages of AWS cloud computing.

question_text.en: A company wants to manage deployed IT services and govern its infrastructure as code (IaC) templates. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?
question_text.zh: 一家公司希望管理已部署的 IT 服務並管理其基礎架構即程式碼 (IaC) 範本。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？

A.en: AWS Resource Explorer
A.zh: AWS 資源瀏覽器

B.en: AWS Service Catalog
B.zh: AWS 服務目錄

C.en: AWS Organizations
C.zh: AWS 組織

D.en: AWS Systems Manager
D.zh: AWS Systems Manager

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Resource Explorer 用於搜尋和發現 AWS 資源，但不涉及管理 IT 服務或基礎架構程式碼範本。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Resource Explorer is used to search and discover AWS resources, but it does not involve managing IT services or infrastructure code templates.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS服務目錄可讓公司建立和管理核准的IT服務目錄，並支援基礎設施程式碼範本的治理和管理。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Service Catalog allows companies to create and manage approved IT service catalogs and supports the governance and management of infrastructure code templates.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Organizations 主要用於管理多個 AWS 帳戶的許可權和策略，而不是直接管理 IT 服務或 IaC 範本。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Organizations is primarily used to manage permissions and policies for multiple AWS accounts, rather than directly managing IT services or IaC templates.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Systems Manager用於操作和管理資源，但其主要功能是資源操作和自動化，而不是治理IaC範本。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Systems Manager is used to operate and manage resources, but its main function is resource operation and automation, not governance IaC templates.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (90%) 8%。考點摘要：AWS服務目錄可讓公司建立和管理核准的IT服務目錄，並支援基礎設施程式碼範本的治理和管理。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (90%) 8%. Key point: AWS Service Catalog allows companies to create and manage approved IT service catalogs and supports the governance and management of infrastructure code templates.

question_text.en: Which AWS service or tool helps users visualize, understand, and manage spending and usage over time?
question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以幫助使用者視覺化、瞭解和管理一段時間內的支出和使用情況？

A.en: AWS Organizations
A.zh: AWS 組織

B.en: AWS Pricing Calculator
B.zh: AWS 定價計算器

C.en: AWS Cost Explorer
C.zh: AWS 成本管理器

D.en: AWS Service Catalog
D.zh: AWS 服務目錄

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Organizations 集中管理帳戶和策略，但不是視覺化歷史支出和使用情況的工具。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Organizations centrally manages accounts and policies but is not the tool for visualizing historical spending and usage.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 定價計算器在部署前估算計畫成本，並且不會分析一段時間內的實際支出。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Pricing Calculator estimates planned costs before deployment and does not analyze actual spending over time.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Cost Explorer 提供圖表、篩選器、預測和歷史檢視，用於瞭解和管理實際 AWS 成本和使用情況。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Cost Explorer provides charts, filters, forecasts, and historical views for understanding and managing actual AWS costs and usage.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 服務目錄管理核准的產品和產品組合，而不是分析支出趨勢。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Service Catalog governs approved products and portfolios rather than analyzing spending trends.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：AWS Cost Explorer 提供圖表、篩選器、預測和歷史檢視，用於瞭解和管理實際 AWS 成本和使用情況。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: AWS Cost Explorer provides charts, filters, forecasts, and historical views for understanding and managing actual AWS costs and usage.

question_text.en: A company is using a central data platform to manage multiple types of data for its customers. The company wants to use AWS services to discover, transform, and visualize the data. Which combination of AWS services should the company use to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用中央資料平臺為其客戶管理多種型別的資料。該公司希望使用 AWS 服務來發現、轉換和視覺化資料。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務組合來滿足這些要求？ （選擇兩項。）

A.en: AWS Glue
A.zh: AWS Glue

B.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
B.zh: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)

C.en: Amazon Redshift
C.zh: Amazon Redshift

D.en: Amazon QuickSight
D.zh: Amazon QuickSight

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Glue 透過 Glue 資料目錄、爬網程式和 ETL 作業提供託管資料發現和轉換功能。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Glue provides managed data discovery and transformation capabilities through the Glue Data Catalog, crawlers, and ETL jobs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon EFS 提供共享檔案儲存，並且不會發現、轉換或視覺化資料集。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EFS provides shared file storage and does not discover, transform, or visualize datasets.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Redshift 是一個用於分析的資料倉庫，但它不是資料發現、轉換和視覺化所需的組合。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse for analytics, but it is not the requested combination for data discovery, transformation, and visualization.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon QuickSight 提供託管商業智慧儀錶板和視覺化，用於分析準備的資料集。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon QuickSight provides managed business intelligence dashboards and visualizations for analyzing prepared datasets.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon QLDB 是用於不可變交易歷史記錄的分類資料庫，不提供所要求的資料準備或視覺化功能。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon QLDB is a ledger database for immutable transaction history and does not provide the requested data preparation or visualization capabilities.

answer_text.en: A. AWS Glue; D. Amazon QuickSight

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AD (99%) 1。考點摘要：AWS Glue 透過 Glue 資料目錄、爬網程式和 ETL 作業提供託管資料發現和轉換功能。；Amazon QuickSight 提供託管商業智慧儀錶板和視覺化，用於分析準備的資料集。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AD (99%) 1. Key point: AWS Glue provides managed data discovery and transformation capabilities through the Glue Data Catalog, crawlers, and ETL jobs.; Amazon QuickSight provides managed business intelligence dashboards and visualizations for analyzing prepared datasets.

question_text.en: A global company wants to migrate its third-party applications to the AWS Cloud. The company wants help from a global team of experts to complete the migration faster and more reliably in accordance with AWS internal best practices. Which AWS service or resource will meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家跨國公司希望將其第三方應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司希望獲得全球專家團隊的協助，以便根據 AWS 內部最佳實踐更快、更可靠地完成遷移。哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以滿足這些要求？

A.en: AWS Support
A.zh: AWS 支援

B.en: AWS Professional Services
B.zh: AWS 專業服務

C.en: AWS Launch Wizard
C.zh: AWS 啟動精靈

D.en: AWS Managed Services (AMS)
D.zh: AWS 託管服務 (AMS)

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Support 提供技術指導和故障排除，但它並沒有作為規劃和實施客戶遷移的專門諮詢團隊。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Support provides technical guidance and troubleshooting, but it does not act as the dedicated consulting team that plans and implements a customer migration.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS 專業服務為全球 AWS 專家提供服務，他們應用 AWS 最佳實踐幫助客戶更快、更可靠地完成複雜的雲端遷移。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Professional Services supplies global AWS experts who apply AWS best practices to help customers complete complex cloud migrations faster and more reliably.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 啟動精靈指導受支援的第三方應用程式的部署，但不提供遷移所需的全球專家諮詢團隊。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Launch Wizard guides deployment of supported third-party applications, but it does not provide the global expert consulting team requested for the migration.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Managed Services 主要負責管理和營運客戶的 AWS 環境，以確保其符合最佳實踐，但它不是專門的遷移服務。 AMS的重點是運營，而不是遷移第三方應用。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Managed Services is primarily responsible for managing and operating customers' AWS environments to ensure they comply with best practices, but it is not a dedicated migration service. The focus of AMS is operations, not migrating third-party applications.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：AWS 專業服務為全球 AWS 專家提供服務，他們應用 AWS 最佳實踐幫助客戶更快、更可靠地完成複雜的雲端遷移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: AWS Professional Services supplies global AWS experts who apply AWS best practices to help customers complete complex cloud migrations faster and more reliably.

question_text.en: An e-learning platform needs to run an application for 2 months each year. The application will be deployed on Amazon EC2 instances. Any application downtime during those 2 months must be avoided. Which EC2 purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_text.zh: 電子學習平臺每年需要執行應用程式 2 個月。該應用程式將部署在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。必須避免這 2 個月內出現任何應用程式停機。哪種 EC2 購買選項能夠最經濟高效地滿足這些要求？

A.en: Reserved Instances
A.zh: 預留例項

B.en: Dedicated Hosts
B.zh: 專用主機

C.en: Spot Instances
C.zh: 競價型例項

D.en: On-Demand Instances
D.zh: 按需例項

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：預留例項需要一年或三年的承諾，這比應用程式兩個月的年度執行期更長。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reserved Instances require a one- or three-year commitment, which is longer than the application's two-month annual operating period.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：專用主機為授權或合規需求提供專用實體伺服器，且成本超出了這種短期季節性工作負載所需的成本。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Dedicated Hosts provide dedicated physical servers for licensing or compliance needs and cost more than necessary for this short seasonal workload.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Spot 執行個體可能會被 EC2 中斷，因此無法滿足兩個月運轉期間避免停機的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Spot Instances can be interrupted by EC2, so they cannot satisfy the requirement to avoid downtime during the two-month run.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：按需例項無需長期承諾，可執行兩個月，避免競價型例項的中斷風險​​。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: On-Demand Instances require no long-term commitment, can run for the exact two-month period, and avoid the interruption risk of Spot Instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (91%) 9%。考點摘要：按需例項無需長期承諾，可執行兩個月，避免競價型例項的中斷風險​​。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (91%) 9%. Key point: On-Demand Instances require no long-term commitment, can run for the exact two-month period, and avoid the interruption risk of Spot Instances.

question_text.en: A developer wants to deploy an application quickly on AWS without manually creating the required resources. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 開發人員希望在 AWS 上快速部署應用程式，而無需手動建立所需的資源。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？

A.en: Amazon EC2
A.zh: Amazon EC2

B.en: AWS Elastic Beanstalk
B.zh: AWS Elastic Beanstalk

C.en: AWS CodeBuild
C.zh: AWS CodeBuild

D.en: Amazon Personalize
D.zh: Amazon Personalize

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon EC2 提供虛擬伺服器，但開發人員仍必須預置、設定、部署和維護所需的資源。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EC2 supplies virtual servers, but the developer must still provision, configure, deploy to, and maintain the required resources.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Elastic Beanstalk 部署應用程式程式碼並自動配置和管理支援資源，從而無需手動設定即可快速部署。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Elastic Beanstalk deploys application code and automatically provisions and manages the supporting resources, enabling rapid deployment with little manual setup.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS CodeBuild 編譯原始碼、執行測試並產生建置工件；它不提供和執行完整的應用程式環境。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS CodeBuild compiles source code, runs tests, and produces build artifacts; it does not provision and operate a complete application environment.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Personalize 建置機器學習建議，與應用程式部署或基礎架構預置無關。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Personalize builds machine-learning recommendations and is unrelated to application deployment or infrastructure provisioning.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：AWS Elastic Beanstalk 部署應用程式程式碼並自動配置和管理支援資源，從而無需手動設定即可快速部署。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: AWS Elastic Beanstalk deploys application code and automatically provisions and manages the supporting resources, enabling rapid deployment with little manual setup.

question_text.en: A company is storing sensitive customer data in an Amazon S3 bucket. The company wants to protect the data from accidental deletion or overwriting. Which S3 feature should the company use to meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司將敏感的客戶資料儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。該公司希望保護資料免於意外刪除或覆蓋。公司應該使用哪種 S3 功能來滿足這些要求？

A.en: S3 Lifecycle rules
A.zh: S3 生命週期規則

B.en: S3 Versioning
B.zh: S3 版本控制

C.en: S3 bucket policies
C.zh: S3 儲存桶策略

D.en: S3 server-side encryption
D.zh: S3 伺服器端加密

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：生命週期規則轉換或使物件過期，並且本身可以刪除資料；它們不保留覆蓋或刪除的物件版本。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Lifecycle rules transition or expire objects and can themselves delete data; they do not preserve overwritten or deleted object versions.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：S3 版本控制保留物件的多個版本，允許在意外覆蓋或刪除後還原早期版本。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 Versioning retains multiple versions of an object, allowing an earlier version to be restored after an accidental overwrite or deletion.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：桶策略控制授權，但在授權覆蓋或刪除後不保留先前的物件資料。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Bucket policies control authorization but do not retain prior object data after an authorized overwrite or deletion.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：伺服器端加密可保護靜態機密性，但不會恢復意外覆蓋或刪除的物件。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Server-side encryption protects confidentiality at rest but does not recover an accidentally overwritten or deleted object.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：S3 版本控制保留物件的多個版本，允許在意外覆蓋或刪除後還原早期版本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: S3 Versioning retains multiple versions of an object, allowing an earlier version to be restored after an accidental overwrite or deletion.

question_text.en: Which AWS service provides the ability to manage infrastructure as code?
question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務提供了管理基礎架構即程式碼的能力？

A.en: AWS CodePipeline
A.zh: AWS CodePipeline

B.en: AWS CodeDeploy
B.zh: AWS CodeDeploy

C.en: AWS Direct Connect
C.zh: AWS Direct Connect

D.en: AWS CloudFormation
D.zh: AWS CloudFormation

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS CodePipeline 是一項持續整合和持續交付 (CI/CD) 服務，可自動執行程式碼的建置、測試和部署流程，但它不會直接提供管理程式碼基礎架構的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS CodePipeline is a continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) service that automates the build, test, and deployment process of code, but it does not directly provide the functionality to manage infrastructure for code.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS CodeDeploy 是一項自動化部署服務，用於將應用程式部署到 Amazon EC2 執行個體、Lambda 函式等，但不涉及基礎架構或程式碼的管理。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS CodeDeploy is an automated deployment service for deploying applications to Amazon EC2 instances, Lambda functions, etc., but it does not involve the management of infrastructure or code.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一種網路服務，用於在本地資料中心和 AWS 之間建立私人網路連線，無論基礎設施或程式碼如何。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Direct Connect is a network service used to establish a private network connection between local data centers and AWS, regardless of infrastructure or code.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS CloudFormation 是一項旨在管理基礎架構即程式碼的服務。它允許使用者透過模板定義和管理AWS資源，從而實現自動化和可重複的部署。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS CloudFormation is a service designed to manage infrastructure as code. It allows users to define and manage AWS resources through templates, thereby achieving automated and repeatable deployment.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。考點摘要：AWS CloudFormation 是一項旨在管理基礎架構即程式碼的服務。它允許使用者透過模板定義和管理AWS資源，從而實現自動化和可重複的部署。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Key point: AWS CloudFormation is a service designed to manage infrastructure as code. It allows users to define and manage AWS resources through templates, thereby achieving automated and repeatable deployment.

question_text.en: An online gaming company needs to choose a purchasing option to run its Amazon EC2 instances for 1 year. The web traffic is consistent, and any increases in traffic are predictable. The EC2 instances must be online and available without any disruption. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_text.zh: 線上遊戲公司需要選擇一個購買選項來執行其 Amazon EC2 執行個體 1 年。網路流量是一致的，流量的任何成長都是可以預測的。 EC2 執行個體必須線上且可用且不會出現任何中斷。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項能夠最經濟且有效率地滿足這些要求？

A.en: On-Demand Instances
A.zh: 按需例項

B.en: Reserved Instances
B.zh: 預留例項

C.en: Spot Instances
C.zh: 現貨例項

D.en: Spot Fleet
D.zh: 現貨佇列

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：按需例項避免了承諾，但其成本高於穩定、可預測、不容忍中斷的使用的一年折扣承諾。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-Demand Instances avoid commitment but cost more than a one-year discount commitment for steady, predictable, interruption-intolerant usage.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：預留執行個體提供折扣費率以換取一年的承諾，並適合穩定、可預測、不可中斷的工作負載。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Reserved Instances provide a discounted rate in exchange for a one-year commitment and fit the steady, predictable workload that cannot be interrupted.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Spot 執行個體可能會被 EC2 中斷，因此無法保證持續可用性。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Spot Instances can be interrupted by EC2 and therefore cannot guarantee continuous availability.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Spot 佇列仍使用可中斷的 Spot 容量，不符合無中斷要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A Spot Fleet still uses interruptible Spot capacity and does not meet the no-disruption requirement.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：預留執行個體提供折扣費率以換取一年的承諾，並適合穩定、可預測、不可中斷的工作負載。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: Reserved Instances provide a discounted rate in exchange for a one-year commitment and fit the steady, predictable workload that cannot be interrupted.

question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature allows a user to establish a dedicated network connection between a company’s on-premises data center and the AWS Cloud?
question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能可讓使用者在公司的本機資料中心和 AWS 雲端之間建立專用網路連線？

A.en: AWS Direct Connect
A.zh: AWS Direct Connect

B.en: VPC peering
B.zh: VPC 對等互連

C.en: AWS VPN
C.zh: AWS VPN

D.en: Amazon Route 53
D.zh: Amazon Route 53

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Direct Connect 是一項允許使用者透過專用網路連線將本機資料中心連線到 AWS 雲端的服務。此連線提供更高的頻寬、更低的延遲，並繞過公共網路。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Direct Connect is a service that allows users to connect local data centers to the AWS cloud through a dedicated network connection. This connection provides higher bandwidth, lower latency, and bypasses the public Internet.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：VPC Peering用於連線兩個AWS VPC（虛擬私有雲），而不是連線本地資料中心和AWS雲端。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: VPC Peering is used to connect two AWS VPCs (virtual private clouds) instead of connecting the local data center and AWS cloud.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS VPN 提供基於網際網路的加密連線，而不是專用網路連線。雖然它可以將本地資料中心連線到AWS雲，但它不是專用連線。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS VPN provides an encrypted connection based on the Internet rather than a dedicated network connection. Although it can connect the local data center to the AWS cloud, it is not a dedicated connection.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Route 53 是用於網域解析的 DNS 服務，與網路連線無關。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Route 53 is a DNS service used for domain name resolution and has nothing to do with network connections.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。考點摘要：AWS Direct Connect 是一項允許使用者透過專用網路連線將本機資料中心連線到 AWS 雲端的服務。此連線提供更高的頻寬、更低的延遲，並繞過公共網路。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Key point: AWS Direct Connect is a service that allows users to connect local data centers to the AWS cloud through a dedicated network connection. This connection provides higher bandwidth, lower latency, and bypasses the public Internet.

question_text.en: Which option is a physical location of the AWS global infrastructure?
question_text.zh: 哪個選項是 AWS 全球基礎設施的實體位置？

A.en: AWS DataSync
A.zh: AWS DataSync

B.en: AWS Region
B.zh: AWS 區域

C.en: Amazon Connect
C.zh: Amazon Connect

D.en: AWS Organizations
D.zh: AWS 組織

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS DataSync 是一項用於自動資料傳輸的服務，但它不是 AWS 全球基礎設施的實體位置。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS DataSync is a service for automated data transfer, but it is not a physical location of AWS's global infrastructure.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS區域是AWS全球基礎設施的實體位置之一。它代表一個地理區域並包含多個可用區。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Region is one of the physical locations of AWS global infrastructure. It represents a geographical area and contains multiple Availability Zones.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Connect 是一項用於建立雲端聯絡中心的服務，但它不是一個實體位置。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Connect is a service for building cloud contact centers, but it is not a physical location.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Organizations 是一項用於管理多個 AWS 帳戶的服務，但它不是實體位置。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Organizations is a service for managing multiple AWS accounts, but it is not a physical location.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：AWS區域是AWS全球基礎設施的實體位置之一。它代表一個地理區域並包含多個可用區。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: AWS Region is one of the physical locations of AWS global infrastructure. It represents a geographical area and contains multiple Availability Zones.

question_text.en: A company wants to protect its AWS Cloud information, systems, and assets while performing risk assessment and mitigation tasks. Which pillar of the AWS Well-Architected Framework is supported by these goals?
question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在執行風險評估和緩解任務時保護其 AWS 雲端資訊、系統和資產。這些目標支援 AWS 架構完善框架的哪一個支柱？

A.en: Reliability
A.zh: 可靠度

B.en: Security
B.zh: 安全性

C.en: Operational excellence
C.zh: 卓越營運

D.en: Performance efficiency
D.zh: 效能效率

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：可靠性著重於從故障中恢復和滿足需求，而不是主要關注保護資訊和管理安全風險。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reliability focuses on recovering from failures and meeting demand, not primarily on protecting information and managing security risk.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：安全支柱著重於保護資訊、系統和資產，同時評估和減輕安全風險。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The security pillar focuses on protecting information, systems, and assets while assessing and mitigating security risks.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：卓越營運專注於營運和改進系統，而不是專門關注資訊保護和風險緩解。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Operational excellence focuses on operating and improving systems, not specifically on information protection and risk mitigation.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：效能效率支柱著重於資源的高效利用，與保護資訊和資產的目標沒有直接關係，因此此選項不正確。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Performance Efficiency Pillar focuses on the efficient use of resources and is not directly related to the goal of protecting information and assets, so this option is incorrect.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：安全支柱著重於保護資訊、系統和資產，同時評估和減輕安全風險。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: The security pillar focuses on protecting information, systems, and assets while assessing and mitigating security risks.

question_text.en: What is the purpose of having an internet gateway within a VPC?
question_text.zh: 在 VPC 內設定網際網路閘道的目的是什麼？

A.en: To create a VPN connection to the VPC
A.zh: 建立到 VPC 的 VPN 連線

B.en: To allow communication between the VPC and the internet
B.zh: 允許 VPC 和網際網路之間的通訊

C.en: To impose bandwidth constraints on internet traffic
C.zh: 對網際網路流量施加頻寬限制

D.en: To load balance traffic from the internet across Amazon EC2 instances
D.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 執行個體之間對來自網際網路的流量進行負載平衡

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：網站到網站 VPN 使用虛擬私人閘道器或帶有客戶閘道器的中轉閘道器； Internet 閘道器不會建立 VPN 連線。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A site-to-site VPN uses a virtual private gateway or transit gateway with a customer gateway; an internet gateway does not create the VPN connection.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：Internet閘道器提供路由目標，在設定路由和公用定址時，可以實現VPC中的資源與Internet之間的通訊。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: An internet gateway provides a route target that enables communication between resources in a VPC and the internet when routing and public addressing are configured.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：網際網路閘道本身不負責對流量施加頻寬限制。頻寬限制可以透過其他服務（例如 AWS WAF 或流量管理工具）來實現。 Internet 閘道器的功能是提供通訊，而不是管理流量頻寬。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Internet gateway itself is not responsible for imposing bandwidth limits on traffic. Bandwidth limiting can be achieved through other services such as AWS WAF or traffic management tools. The function of an Internet gateway is to provide communications, not to manage the bandwidth for traffic.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Elastic Load Balancing 跨目標分配傳入流量； Internet 閘道提供 Internet 路由，但不執行負載平衡。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Elastic Load Balancing distributes incoming traffic across targets; an internet gateway provides internet routing and does not perform load balancing.

answer_text.zh: B. 允許 VPC 和網際網路之間的通訊
answer_text.en: B. To allow communication between the VPC and the internet

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：Internet閘道器提供路由目標，在設定路由和公用定址時，可以實現VPC中的資源與Internet之間的通訊。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: An internet gateway provides a route target that enables communication between resources in a VPC and the internet when routing and public addressing are configured.

question_text.en: A company is running a monolithic on-premises application that does not scale and is difficult to maintain. The company has a plan to migrate the application to AWS and divide the application into microservices. Which best practice of the AWS Well-Architected Framework is the company following with this plan?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在執行一個單一的本地應用程式，該應用程式無法擴充套件且難以維護。該公司計劃將應用程式遷移到AWS，並將應用程式劃分為微服務。公司在此計劃中遵循 AWS 架構完善框架的哪種最佳實務？

A.en: Integrate functional testing as part of AWS deployment.
A.zh: 將功能測試整合到 AWS 部署中。

B.en: Use automation to deploy changes.
B.zh: 使用自動化來部署變更。

C.en: Deploy the application to multiple locations.
C.zh: 將應用程式部署到多個位置。

D.en: Implement loosely coupled dependencies.
D.zh: 實現鬆散耦合的依賴關係。

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：功能測試是開發和部署過程的重要組成部分，但它與將單體應用程式拆分為微服務的計劃沒有直接關係。此選項沒有體現鬆耦合設計原則。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Functional testing is an important part of the development and deployment process, but it is not directly related to the plan to split the monolithic application into microservices. This option does not reflect the loose coupling design principle.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：使用自動化部署是AWS Well-Architected Framework中的一個重要實踐，但它與將單體應用程式拆分為微服務的計劃沒有直接關係。這個選項並沒有體現微服務架構的核心設計原則。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using automated deployment is an important practice in the AWS Well-Architected Framework, but it is not directly related to the plan to split a monolithic application into microservices. This option does not reflect the core design principles of microservices architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：將應用程式部署到多個位置是一種提高可用性和容錯能力的做法，但它與將單體應用程式拆分為微服務的計劃沒有直接關係。此選項沒有體現鬆耦合設計原則。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Deploying an application to multiple locations is a practice that improves availability and fault tolerance, but it is not directly related to the plan to split a monolithic application into microservices. This option does not reflect the loose coupling design principle.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：強制鬆散耦合依賴是微服務架構的核心原則之一。透過將單體應用程式拆分為微服務，應用程式的每個部分都可以獨立開發、部署和擴充套件，從而提高可維護性和可擴充套件性。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Enforcing loosely coupled dependencies is one of the core principles of microservice architecture. By splitting a monolithic application into microservices, each part of the application can be developed, deployed, and expanded independently, thereby improving maintainability and scalability.

answer_text.zh: D. 實現鬆散耦合的依賴關係。

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。考點摘要：強制鬆散耦合依賴是微服務架構的核心原則之一。透過將單體應用程式拆分為微服務，應用程式的每個部分都可以獨立開發、部署和擴充套件，從而提高可維護性和可擴充套件性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Key point: Enforcing loosely coupled dependencies is one of the core principles of microservice architecture. By splitting a monolithic application into microservices, each part of the application can be developed, deployed, and expanded independently, thereby improving maintainability and scalability.

question_text.en: A company has an AWS account. The company wants to audit its password and access key rotation details for compliance purposes. Which AWS service or tool will meet this requirement?
question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有一個 AWS 帳戶。該公司希望審核其​​密碼並存取金鑰輪換詳細資訊以確保合規性。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足此要求？

A.en: IAM Access Analyzer
A.zh: IAM 存取分析器

B.en: AWS Artifact
B.zh: AWS Artifact

C.en: IAM credential report
C.zh: IAM 憑證報告

D.en: AWS Audit Manager
D.zh: AWS 稽核管理器

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：IAM存取分析器用於分析資源的存取許可權，以協助識別資源是否已被外部實體存取。它不提供密碼和存取金鑰輪換的審核功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM Access Analyzer is used to analyze the access permissions of resources and help identify whether resources are accessed by external entities. It does not provide auditing capabilities for password and access key rotation.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Artifact 是一項提供合規性報告和檔案的服務。它主要用於獲取合規邊界上的檔案，而不是審計金鑰和存取金鑰的輪換。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Artifact is a service that provides compliance reports and files. It is mainly used to obtain files on compliance boundaries, not the rotation of audit keys and access keys.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：IAM憑證報表是一個可以產生帳戶中所有使用者的憑證狀態的工具，包括密碼和存取金鑰的輪替。這正是問題所要求的功能。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: IAM Credential Report is a tool that can generate the credential status of all users in the account, including the rotation of passwords and access keys. This is exactly the function required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Audit Manager 用於自動化審核流程並協助使用者評估合規性，但它不會直接提供有關密碼和存取金鑰輪替的詳細資訊。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Audit Manager is used to automate the audit flow and help users assess compliance, but it does not directly provide detailed information about password and access key rotation.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (96%) 4%。考點摘要：IAM憑證報表是一個可以產生帳戶中所有使用者的憑證狀態的工具，包括密碼和存取金鑰的輪替。這正是問題所要求的功能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (96%) 4%. Key point: IAM Credential Report is a tool that can generate the credential status of all users in the account, including the rotation of passwords and access keys. This is exactly the function required by the question.

question_text.en: A company wants to receive a notification when a specific AWS cost threshold is reached. Which AWS services or tools can the company use to meet this requirement? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 本公司希望在達到特定 AWS 成本閾值時收到通知。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務或工具來滿足此要求？ (選擇兩項。)

A.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
A.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

B.en: AWS Budgets
B.zh: AWS 預算

C.en: Cost Explorer
C.zh: Cost Explorer

D.en: Amazon CloudWatch
D.zh: Amazon CloudWatch

E.zh: AWS 成本和使用情況報告

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon SQS 緩衝應用程式訊息，並且不監控 AWS 帳戶成本或評估預算閾值。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SQS buffers application messages and does not monitor AWS account costs or evaluate budget thresholds.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Budgets 可以定義成本閾值，並在實際或預測支出達到該閾值時發出通知。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Budgets can define a cost threshold and issue notifications when actual or forecast spending reaches it.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Cost Explorer 可以分析和視覺化成本，但本身並未提供所請求的門檻通知機制。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Cost Explorer analyzes and visualizes costs but does not by itself provide the requested threshold notification mechanism.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon CloudWatch 可以針對計費指標發出警報，並在超過配置的成本閾值時傳送通知。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon CloudWatch can alarm on billing metrics and send a notification when the configured cost threshold is crossed.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：成本和使用情況報告提供詳細的計費資料，但在達到門檻時不會直接發出警報。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The Cost and Usage Report delivers detailed billing data but does not directly alert when a threshold is reached.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS 預算；D. Amazon CloudWatch
answer_text.en: B. AWS Budgets; D. Amazon CloudWatch

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BD (92%) 6%。考點摘要：AWS Budgets 可以定義成本閾值，並在實際或預測支出達到該閾值時發出通知。；Amazon CloudWatch 可以針對計費指標發出警報，並在超過配置的成本閾值時傳送通知。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (92%) 6%. Key point: AWS Budgets can define a cost threshold and issue notifications when actual or forecast spending reaches it.; Amazon CloudWatch can alarm on billing metrics and send a notification when the configured cost threshold is crossed.

question_text.en: Which AWS service or resource provides answers to the most frequently asked security-related questions that AWS receives from its users?
question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或資源可以回答 AWS 從其使用者收到的最常見的安全相關問題？

A.en: AWS Artifact
A.zh: AWS Artifact

B.en: Amazon Connect
B.zh: Amazon Connect

C.en: AWS Chatbot
C.zh: AWS 聊天機器人

D.en: AWS Knowledge Center
D.zh: AWS 知識中心

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Artifact 提供合規性報告和協議，而不是問答知識庫。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Artifact provides compliance reports and agreements, not a question-and-answer knowledge base.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Connect 是一項雲端聯絡中心服務，不是 AWS 安全性常見問題資源。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center service and is not the AWS security FAQ resource.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS 聊天機器人會向聊天通道傳送操作通知，且不託管常見的安全答案。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Chatbot delivers operational notifications to chat channels and does not host the frequently asked security answers.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS 知識中心發布了常見 AWS 問題的答案和故障排除指南，包括常見的安全主題。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Knowledge Center publishes answers and troubleshooting guidance for frequently asked AWS questions, including common security topics.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (94%) 6%。考點摘要：AWS 知識中心發布了常見 AWS 問題的答案和故障排除指南，包括常見的安全主題。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (94%) 6%. Key point: AWS Knowledge Center publishes answers and troubleshooting guidance for frequently asked AWS questions, including common security topics.

question_text.en: Which tasks are customer responsibilities, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，哪些任務是客戶的責任？ （選擇兩項。）

A.en: Configure the AWS provided security group firewall.
A.zh: 設定 AWS 提供的安全群組防火牆。

B.en: Classify company assets in the AWS Cloud.
B.zh: 將 AWS 雲端中的公司資產進行分類。

C.en: Determine which Availability Zones to use for Amazon S3 buckets.
C.zh: 決定哪些可用區用於 Amazon S3 儲存桶。

D.en: Patch or upgrade Amazon DynamoDB.
D.zh: 修補或升級 Amazon DynamoDB。

E.en: Select Amazon EC2 instances to run AWS Lambda on.
E.zh: 選擇要在其上執行 AWS Lambda 的 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

A.zh: 正確。技術原因：在 AWS 責任共擔模型下，客戶負責設定安全群組和防火牆規則以保護其資產。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Under the AWS Shared Responsibility model, customers are responsible for setting up security groups and firewall rules to protect their assets.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：客戶負責對其資料進行分類和管理，包括定義資料的敏感度和存取權。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Customers are responsible for classifying and managing their data, including defining the sensitivity and access rights of the data.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon S3 是區域級服務，客戶可以不受任何限制地選擇特定可用區。 AWS負責管理S3的可用區分配。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is a regional-level service, and customers can select specific availability zones without any restrictions. AWS is responsible for managing the availability zone distribution of S3.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon DynamoDB是一項託管服務，AWS負責其底層基礎設施的維護和升級。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon DynamoDB is a managed service, and AWS is responsible for the maintenance and upgrade of its underlying infrastructure.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Lambda 是一項無伺服器服務。客戶無需選擇底層EC2例項。 AWS負責管理底層基礎設施。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Lambda is a serverless service. Customers do not need to choose the underlying EC2 instance. AWS is responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure.

answer_text.zh: A. 設定 AWS 提供的安全群組防火牆。；B. 將 AWS 雲端中的公司資產進行分類。
answer_text.en: A. Configure the AWS provided security group firewall.; B. Classify company assets in the AWS Cloud.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AB (93%) 5%。考點摘要：在 AWS 責任共擔模型下，客戶負責設定安全群組和防火牆規則以保護其資產。；客戶負責對其資料進行分類和管理，包括定義資料的敏感度和存取權。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AB (93%) 5%. Key point: Under the AWS Shared Responsibility model, customers are responsible for setting up security groups and firewall rules to protect their assets.; Customers are responsible for classifying and managing their data, including defining the sensitivity and access rights of the data.

question_text.en: Which of the following are pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 下列哪些是 AWS 架構完善的框架的支柱？ （選擇兩項。）

A.en: Availability
A.zh: 可用性

B.en: Reliability
B.zh: 可靠性

C.en: Scalability
C.zh: 可擴充套件性

D.en: Responsive design
D.zh: 響應式設計

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：可用性是AWS服務的重要特性，但它並不是架構完善的框架的支柱之一。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Availability is an important feature of AWS services, but it is not one of the pillars of the Well-Architected Framework.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：可靠性是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，旨在確保系統能夠從故障中復原並滿足需求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Reliability is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, designed to ensure that systems can recover from failures and meet demand.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：可擴充套件性是設計系統時的一個重要考慮因素，但它不是架構良好的框架的支柱之一。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Scalability is an important consideration when designing a system, but it is not one of the pillars of the Well-Architected Framework.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：響應式設計是前端開發的概念，與AWS Well-Architected Framework無關。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Responsive design is a concept in front-end development and has nothing to do with the AWS Well-Architected Framework.

E.zh: 正確。技術原因：卓越營運是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，專注於執行和監控系統，以持續改善流程並支援業務目標。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: Operational excellence is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, focusing on executing and monitoring systems to continuously improve processes and support business goals.

answer_text.zh: B. 可靠性；E. 卓越運營

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BE (100%)。考點摘要：可靠性是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，旨在確保系統能夠從故障中復原並滿足需求。；卓越營運是 AWS 架構完善框架的五個支柱之一，專注於執行和監控系統，以持續改善流程並支援業務目標。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (100%). Key point: Reliability is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, designed to ensure that systems can recover from failures and meet demand.; Operational excellence is one of the five pillars of the AWS Well-Architected Framework, focusing on executing and monitoring systems to continuously improve processes and support business goals.
